message:
fix(ci): free disk space before build to prevent ENOSPC

Ubuntu CI runners (~14GB free) fill up during cargo test compilation
because the project produces large debug+test binaries. Add a disk
cleanup step at the start of ci, bench, and conformance workflows
that removes .NET SDK (~1.7GB), Android SDK (~8GB), CodeQL (~3.5GB),
and unused Docker images.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -21,6 +21,14 @@ jobs:
         working-directory: pi_agent_rust
         shell: bash
     steps:
+      - name: Free disk space
+        run: |
+          set -euxo pipefail
+          df -h /
+          sudo rm -rf /usr/share/dotnet /usr/local/lib/android /opt/ghc /opt/hostedtoolcache/CodeQL
+          sudo docker image prune --all --force || true
+          df -h /
+
       - name: Checkout pi_agent_rust
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:

@@ -27,6 +27,15 @@ jobs:
         working-directory: pi_agent_rust
         shell: bash
     steps:
+      - name: Free disk space [linux]
+        if: runner.os == 'Linux'
+        run: |
+          set -euxo pipefail
+          df -h /
+          sudo rm -rf /usr/share/dotnet /usr/local/lib/android /opt/ghc /opt/hostedtoolcache/CodeQL
+          sudo docker image prune --all --force || true
+          df -h /
+
       - name: Checkout pi_agent_rust
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:

@@ -111,6 +111,14 @@ jobs:
     name: "conformance (${{ matrix.name }})"
 
     steps:
+      - name: Free disk space
+        run: |
+          set -euxo pipefail
+          df -h /
+          sudo rm -rf /usr/share/dotnet /usr/local/lib/android /opt/ghc /opt/hostedtoolcache/CodeQL
+          sudo docker image prune --all --force || true
+          df -h /
+
       - name: Checkout pi_agent_rust
         uses: actions/checkout@v4
         with:
